zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Home於從1345年到1360年出生在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾霍米時，他的父親John de Home42歲，母親Ada de Dunbar35歲。他於從1339年到1402年與Nicole Pepdie在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於從1426年到1427年在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安登格拉斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Home于从1345年到1360年出生在苏格兰貝維其可爾霍米时，他的父亲John de Home42岁，母亲Ada de Dunbar35岁。他于从1339年到1402年与Nicole Pepdie在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于从1426年到1427年在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安登格拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: Home
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Hume  .

English: habitational name from Home in Clifton on Teme or in Feckenham (Worcestershire) or from a minor place similarly named, a variant of Hamm (from Middle English ham(me), with rounding of the vowel before the nasal consonant to give hom(me)).

variants.name: Hume
meanings: Scottish (Lowlands) and northern English: variant of Hulme , with loss of l before the bilabial consonant /m/, as in the vocabulary word calm. See Holm and Home .

Scottish: habitational name either from the barony of Home or from Hume (or Home) in Berwickshire, from which the barony took its name. The placename derives from Old English hōum, dative plural form of hōh ‘heel, spur of land’.
History: A family of this name (see 2 above) have held the Earldom of Home since 1605.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Home was born from 1345 to 1360, in Home, Berwickshire, Scotland, his father, John de Home, was 42 and his mother, Ada de Dunbar, was 35. He married Nicole Pepdie from 1339 to 1402, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died from 1426 to 1427, in Dunglass, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Home est né du 1345 au 1360, à Home, Berwickshire, Écosse, son père, John de Home, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Ada de Dunbar, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Nicole Pepdie du 1339 au 1402, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé du 1426 au 1427, à Dunglass, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Home von 1345 bis 1360 in Home, Berwickshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Home 42 und seine Mutter Ada de Dunbar 35. Er hat von 1339 bis 1402 in Scotland Nicole Pepdie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb von 1426 bis 1427 in Dunglass, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom.

Lui sposato Nicole Pepdie da 1339 a 1402, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì da 1426 a 1427, nel Dunglass, East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Homeがから1345年まで1360年にスコットランドバーウィクシュアイアホーメで生まれた時，父John de Homeは42歳，母Ada de Dunbarは35歳であった。から1339年まで1402年にスコットランドでNicole Pepdieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼はから1426年まで1427年にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンダングラスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Home(이)가 1345년 부터 1360년 까지 스컷랜드 버윅실르 홈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Home(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Ada de Dunbar(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1339년 부터 1402년 까지 스컷랜드에서 Nicole Pepdie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1426년 부터 1427년 까지 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 던글래스에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Home родился с 1345 по 1360 в местности хом, бирвиккшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John de Home было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Ada de Dunbar, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Nicole Pepdie с 1339 по 1402 в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер с 1426 по 1427 в местности дунгласс, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания.
